content.en:
Ye Tian submitted an application to enter the Chaos Tower to cultivate in the illusory world, and then waited quietly.

The opening of the Chaos Tower is not a trivial matter, and the high-level leaders of the Terran Supreme Hall Yellow-level Region definitely need to discuss it.

Moreover, the Chaos Tower is different from other cultivation towers, and it has been a long time since the Chaos Refining Technique has been cultivated, so the Chaos Tower has naturally not been opened for a long time.

This time, Ye Tian suddenly applied to enter the Chaos Tower to cultivate, and it was estimated that there would be a lot of turmoil.

......

The supreme hall of the human race, the town hall.

The town hall pavilion is the area where the town hall envoys are located, and the town hall envoys of the four inner temple regions of the yellow-level region, the Xuan-level region, the prefecture-level region and the heaven-level region are all here.

It can be said that the town hall pavilion can also be regarded as a very powerful institution in the inner hall.

The town hall envoy is divided into the town hall envoy and the big town hall envoy, as well as the town hall pavilion master and the three deputy pavilion masters.

The last time they were responsible for opening the Divine Ritual Sacrifice were the six town palace envoys in the yellow-level area of the Town Palace Pavilion, the town palace envoys in the yellow-level area are basically the town palace envoys, and the big town palace envoys are basically responsible for the two regions of heaven and earth.

Then.

In one of the rooms of the Town Palace, six town hall envoys were discussing.

These six town hall envoys are the town hall envoys who were in charge of the divine festival last time.

Among them, the leader is the god of the platform!

At this time, the six cosmic gods had already learned about Ye Tian's application and were in a meeting.

"His Highness of Ten Thousand Laws in the Yellow-level region, Ye Tian, submitted an application to enter the Chaos Tower to cultivate not long ago!"

The Divine Lord of the Shotai spoke.

"If you want to enter the Chaos Tower to cultivate, you must cultivate the Chaos Refining Body Technique to the peak of the entry, how long has it been, His Highness Wanfa has not only practiced the Chaos Refining Technique, but also cultivated it to the peak of the entry, how can I not believe it. "

"The speed is indeed too fast, His Highness, who was qualified to cultivate the Chaos Refining Body Technique in the past, also took a long time to cultivate the beginning, the Chaos Refining Body Technique is the Supreme Divine Codex, and it is the most powerful Divine Book among the Supreme Divine Scriptures, how can it be so easy to cultivate successfully?"

"Is it possible to reject His Highness Wanfa's application?"

"It cannot be rejected directly, according to the rules, it must be tested first, and it must be confirmed before you can decide whether to refuse the application. "

"Well, then let's test it, just in case, I mean in case, he really reaches the peak realm of the Chaos Body Refining Technique, then the Chaos Tower must be opened!"

"Well, that's nature!"

After the six town hall envoys finished discussing, they notified Ye Tian to go to the town hall pavilion for testing.

------------

"Zhendian Pavilion, let me test!"

Ye Tian looked at the message sent by Zhendian Pavilion, and hurriedly called Ziya.

"Ziya, take me to the Zhendian Pavilion!"

Ye Tian commanded.

"Master, the Zhendian Pavilion is a relatively important institution of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and Ziya has not yet had the permission to enter the Zhendian Pavilion!" Ziya said.

"I have already applied to enter the Chaos Tower to cultivate, and the Zhendian Pavilion has agreed!"

Ye Tian said.

"Master, so that's the case, then I also have to apply for permission, otherwise I won't be able to bring the master into the Zhendian Pavilion!"

Ziya's application is simple, her eyes are closed and opened, and the application is completed in less than a few seconds.

"The application has been approved, master, I will take you there!"

Ziya opened the space door and entered it with Ye Tian.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the gate of the Zhendian Pavilion.

The huge town hall pavilion was like an ancient giant beast, and the monstrous momentum made Ye Tian's heart tremble.

Such a building is not an ordinary building, but a powerful artifact that surpasses the top-grade artifact.

There is no one to watch the door in the Town Hall Pavilion, after all, this is where the Town Hall envoys live, and the Town Hall Envoys are all cosmic god realms and even more powerful existences, so naturally there is no need for gatekeepers.

Ye Tian was about to shout, and a voice came.

"Come in!"

Before Ye Tian could react, he found that he was already in a hall.

At this time.

A cosmic god was standing in front of Ye Tian.

Ye Tian recognized the other party and said respectfully: "I've seen the Shentai Divine Master!"

The Divine Lord of the Divine Lord nodded slightly, and then asked, "Your Highness Wanfa, have you really cultivated the Chaos Body Refining Technique to the peak realm of entry?" If it is a false report, it will delay the time of our town hall envoy, but it needs to be punished." "

"I have indeed cultivated the Chaos Body Refining Technique to the peak of the second layer, which is the peak of entry!"

Ye Tian said truthfully.

"Then you can run the Chaos Body Refining Technique here, if you really cultivate the Chaos Body Refining Technique to the peak of the entry, then our Town Hall Pavilion will open the Chaos Tower for you and let you enter it to cultivate!"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and began to operate the Chaos Refining Technique.

Rumble!!!!

The Chaos Refining Body Technique operated, and Ye Tian's Chaotic Body absorbed the Chaos Yuan Qi here.

The Lord of the Divine Lord is the God of the Universe, what a powerful existence, although he has not cultivated the Chaos Refining Technique, he has also seen His Highness who has cultivated the Chaos Refining Technique a long time ago, so he can judge at a glance the realm that Ye Tian is now in with the Chaos Refining Technique.

"He really reached the peak realm of the second layer of the Chaos Body Refining Technique, how did he cultivate?"

The Shentai Divine Lord was extremely shocked.

It was the first time he had seen a Highness who could cultivate the Chaos Refining Body Technique to the peak of the entry level so quickly, far surpassing any previous Highness.

Originally, he felt that Ye Tian's choice of the Chaos Body Refining Technique was a mistake.

Now, he thinks he's wrong!

Ye Tian was really too suitable for cultivating the Chaos Body Refining Technique, and the Chaos Body Refining Technique was simply tailor-made for him.

"This Ten Thousand Laws His Highness is almost 100% able to cultivate the Chaos Refining Body Technique to the third layer realm, the third layer is Xiaocheng, if he can cultivate to the fifth layer of the Dacheng realm, it is definitely more powerful than the ordinary Divine Scripture Perfection Realm!"

However, the Divine Master also knew that cultivating the Chaos Body Refining Technique required conditions, and it was good to just get started, only seven god-level attribute talents were needed; if you wanted to cultivate the Chaos Body Refining Technique to the Dacheng realm, you must have ten god-level attribute talents, and if you want to cultivate the Chaos Body Refining Technique to the consummation realm, you must have twelve god-level all-attribute talents.

He didn't think that Ye Tian had a god-level space talent and a god-level time talent, otherwise Ye Tian's combat power would have been against the sky.

But as long as Ye Tian could cultivate to the Dacheng realm, it would be enough, enough to surpass His Highness the Consummation Level of the Ordinary Divine Codex.

Thereupon.

The Divine Lord asked, "Your Highness Wanfa, do you have the confidence to cultivate the Chaos Refining Body Technique to the Dacheng realm in the future?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian replied with great certainty.

Seeing that Ye Tian was full of confidence, he was ready to propose to the high-level afterwards to give Ye Tian a proper opportunity.

Of course.

This is not special treatment, but to provide opportunities, as for whether Ye Tian can grasp it, it depends on Ye Tian himself.

"Your Highness Wanfa, you wait here, I will consult with the other town hall envoys for a while, and then I will prepare to open the Chaos Tower. Since it will take a little time to open the Chaos Tower, you should wait a little longer!"

After the god lord finished speaking, he disappeared.

Ye Tian stood here, silently waiting.

The other side.

The god lord of the platform joined up with the other five envoys of the town hall.

"How is the Divine Lord of the Throne?" one of the town hall envoys asked.

"His Highness Wanfa has indeed cultivated the Chaos Body Refining Technique to the peak of the entry, that is, the second layer of the Chaos Body Refining Technique, I can confirm that it is correct!" said the Divine Lord of the Chaos Sect with a tone of surprise.

"It turned out to be real!!"

The other five town hall envoys were all stunned.

This news is so shocking!

"Let's call up his record in the battle tower and see his strength!"

One of the cosmic gods proposed.

Under normal circumstances, the envoys of the town hall cannot investigate the strength of their highnesses in the battle tower, which is managed by another organization, that is, the battle hall of the supreme hall of the human race.

The town hall envoys can't control the battle hall, but as long as a few town hall envoys use the permission, they can still extract all the information of a highness, but it is only limited to the peak-level cosmic son and the ordinary cosmic son of the yellow-level region.

If Ye Tian was the son of the Eternal Universe, then even the envoy of the Town Palace would not be qualified to extract Ye Tian's information.

The Son of the Eternal Universe is the true treasure of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and he is also the core elite, who is highly focused on and even has special permissions.

It's a pity that there is not a single Constant-level Universe Son in the Yellow-level region now, and the original three Constant-level Universe Sons have fallen, which is too great a blow to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race!

This time, the Supreme Hall of the Human Race recruited the Son of the Universe in the hope of cultivating an Ancient-level Son of the Universe, so as not to make the Human Race lose face in the Emperor-level Son of the Universe in that prosperous era more than ninety years later.

"Agreed!"

"Seconded!"

The six envoys of the town hall all agreed, and immediately applied to the war hall for information.

Soon, the War Hall agreed.

Then, a copy of the information was transmitted.

After reading it, the six town hall envoys were stunned.

"Battle tower record, break through the fifth layer, have the second-grade peak-level Son of the Universe combat power, points: 7982!"

When the Shentai Divine Lord saw this information, his eyes immediately widened: "This kid has only been at the peak of our human race for a few years, and his strength has actually broken through from the second layer of the battle tower to the fifth layer, and where did he get the 7982 points???"

7982 points is nothing in their eyes, but in the yellow area, it is definitely the first, and no one has so many points.

Because every highness needs points in exchange for opportunities or resources to improve their strength, even the previous Eternal Universe Son is difficult to save so many points!

When you look through the entire document, everything is clear!

"This kid sent a transaction message in the illusory world, selling the Nether Stone, and in his transaction records, several His Highnesses transferred money to him. These points were earned by him by selling Nether Stones, and it seems that he has a very strong ability to find Nether Stones, and he has found so many Nether Stones!"

The Divine Lord of the Shotai put down the information.

At this time, Ye Tian's strength and talent were undoubted, he was definitely the top of the top, and he had cultivated the Chaos Refining Body Technique to the peak of entry, so he was naturally qualified to enter the Chaos Tower to cultivate.

"The six of us will apply to the above to open the Chaos Tower!"

The god of the platform proposed.

"Yes!"

"Yes!"

"Yes!"

......

The six town palace envoys applied and received a quick reply.

"Permission!"

Then.

Six town hall envoys have come to the Chaos Tower, ready to open the Chaos Tower!
